OEAA – FREETOWN – SIERRA LEONE CHAPTER

We are deeply saddened by the untimely passing of our beloved JSS Principal, Mrs. Massaquoi.

She was not only a dedicated leader but also a true partner in the important work we are doing at the school.

Her legacy of commitment and service will never be forgotten. May her gentle soul rest in perfect peace. 💐💐💐

Upcoming Events

Upcoming Events in the various Chapters

OEAA Global

The Old Edwardians Alumni Association – Global is a proud network of former students of St. Edward’s Secondary School, united by a common goal: to preserve the legacy of our alma mater while actively contributing to its growth and future success.
